name: Lemon Shrimp Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cooked shrimp, rice, mushroom soup, grated cheese, chopped green pepper, green onion, and celery in a bowl.
2. In a separate pan, melt the butter over medium heat. Add the chopped green onion and celery, and sauté until tender.
3. Pour the sautéed vegetables into the bowl with the shrimp mixture.
4. Place the casserole in an oven-safe dish and spread it evenly.
5. Arrange sliced lemons on top of the casserole.
6. Bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes, or until heated through and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serves 6.
